fix_1_bot_leak_account_info.evidence: account-info@skydo.com now classified bot at Gmail ingress; additional compound bot localparts like -noreply, -alerts, -bounces also caught

fix_2_name_leak_digital_ocean.evidence: stripForwardedChainName drops SaaS vendor display names when they appear on non-vendor email domains; 'digital ocean' no longer appears as a bucket name anywhere

fix_3_cross_channel_split_umayr.evidence: Umayr WA bucket (phone + LID + 6 groups) merged with Gmail bucket (usheik@sinxsolutions.ai) via Layer 2 fuzzy-name bridge; single record with all 5 provenance flags + cross_channel_name_match: true

fix_4_positive_source_lid_rule.evidence: phoneForContact ignores contacts.phone for @lid jids; session.db whatsmeow_lid_map is the only valid source. Already inlined in manifest-gen v1; now reusable.

fix_5_seed_filter.evidence: isResolvableLidContact drops @lid rows with no name and no lidMap bridge. Already inlined in manifest-gen v1 (dropped 4,985 ghosts); now reusable.

regression_check.hardeep_gambhir: 5-source merged record (wa_dm+wa_contact+wa_group+gmail_from+google_contact) — bridge added hardeep@localhosthq.com correctly
regression_check.ramon_b: Bridged to ramongberrios@gmail.com correctly; ramon@castmagic.io remains separate as expected
regression_check.imran_sable: Two gmail-only buckets preserved (different emails, ambiguous); Imran Sir WA bucket separate

surprises: Google Contacts is phone-keyed in Sanchay's corpus, so WA-side buckets often include google_contact in provenance. Bridge filter relaxed from 'strict only-WA provenance' to 'has at least one WA/google_contact signal and NO gmail signal'.
googleone-out-of-quota-noreply@google.com escaped the anchored ^noreply$ regex. Added contains-regex for compound bot localparts.
WhatsApp labels like 'Amazon', 'Google' would bridge to vendor bot emails. Added SaaS vendor blocklist to isGenericName.
'Amazon.in' (Gmail sender name) tokenizes to [amazon, in]; added token-level vendor check for ≤2-token names.
